name: frontend-testing
tagline: Guides writing, updating, and reviewing Vitest frontend tests in Dify's web/ and packages/dify-ui/ workspaces.
verdict: Safe, tightly scoped skill with clear triggers and exclusions and no security concerns. Weak spots: the final step only says to 'report' with no defined format, the workflow never says what to do if a test or check fails, the central `vp` test CLI is used repeatedly without any requirements or availability check, and there is no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Only deliverable stated is 'Report what behavior was verified...' — no artifact, format, or location defined.
Seven-step workflow never addresses a failing test, missing web/docs/test.md, or an unavailable `vp` CLI.
The `vp` test CLI is the skill's core tool, invoked three times with no requirements section or availability check.
